productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Teal Flip Flop
description: Style Note Chill out in style and revel in comfort with these uber-cool flip-flops from united colors of benetton. Add style to your outfit by pairing these funky flip-flops with torn jeans and t-shirt.  Product Details Teal flip-flops with rubber straps and soft fabric toe separator Cushioned footbed with graphic print all over Rubber outsole with wave patterned grooves Material and Care Rubber Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
